description: SVN source control and history viewer for Visual Studio Code.
command.refresh.title: Refresh SVN Status
command.commit.title: Commit SVN Changes
command.update.title: Update SVN Working Copy
command.cleanup.title: Cleanup SVN Working Copy
command.openHistory.title: Open SVN History
command.openRepositoryActions.title: More SVN Actions
command.openDiff.title: Open Diff
command.openFile.title: Open File
command.revertResource.title: Revert Resource
command.revertGroup.title: Revert All Changes
command.addResource.title: Add Resource
command.addGroup.title: Add All Unversioned
command.deleteResource.title: Delete Resource
command.openHistoryDiff.title: Open History Diff
config.title: SVN Graph
config.displayLanguage.description: Preferred display language for SVN Graph. When set to Auto, the extension follows the current VS Code UI language.
config.displayLanguage.auto: Detect automatically from the current VS Code UI language.
config.displayLanguage.en: Always show English UI text for runtime views and prompts.
config.displayLanguage.zhCN: Always show Simplified Chinese UI text for runtime views and prompts.
config.remoteStatusIntervalSeconds.descr: Interval in seconds between automatic remote status refreshes.
config.maxLogEntries.description: Number of revisions loaded per batch in the history webview. Older history is fetched automatically as you scroll.
